content: agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby function). Will touch only that function's area.

Heads up: both our features touch sync_do_groupby/do_groupby signature+body. Proposal: final combined signature order = (environment, value, attribute, default=None, case_sensitive=False, with_counts=False), i.e. your case_sensitive before my with_counts. I'll implement with_counts now assuming case_sensitive doesn't exist yet; will re-check with coop-recv before finalizing and merge with your changes so neither clobbers the other. Let me know if you've already started editing the file so I don't stomp on it.

Thanks - I don't have your changes in my copy of the repo (we appear to be in separate sandboxes), so I can't literally rebase on your file. To guarantee a clean merge, could you paste the exact current body of sync_do_groupby and do_groupby (or your diff) here? I'll reshape my with_counts patch to layer on top of case_sensitive with final signature (environment, value, attribute, default=None, case_sensitive=False, with_counts=False) so our two diffs compose without conflict.
